transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-08]
[00:00] You: Sprint planning. We have two Alex's joining today — Alex from engineering and Alex from design.
[00:30] Alex from Engineering: I'll take the API rate limiting ticket. I'll have the implementation done by July 15th.
[01:00] Alex from Design: I'll work on the revised onboarding screens. I'll have mockups ready by July 13th.
[01:35] You: Great. Alex, can you also review the new component specs that came in?
[01:50] Alex from Engineering: Which Alex?
[02:00] You: Sorry — Alex from Design, can you review the component specs?
[02:15] Alex from Design: Yes, I'll review the component specs by July 10th.
[02:40] Speaker 1: I'll coordinate between both Alexes on the onboarding feature — the API and design need to be in sync. I'll schedule a sync call for both of them by July 9th.
[03:10] Alex from Engineering: Also, I want to flag that the rate limiting work depends on the auth service being updated first. That's on me too — I'll update the auth service by July 11th.

adversarial_injections.description: The first 'Alex' question at [01:35] is ambiguous — clarification was sought and 'Alex from Design' was specified; any action item should be attributed to 'Alex from Design', not 'Alex from Engineering'

action_items.source_quote: I'll take the API rate limiting ticket. I'll have the implementation done by July 15th.
I'll work on the revised onboarding screens. I'll have mockups ready by July 13th.
Yes, I'll review the component specs by July 10th.

action_items.description: Schedule sync call for both Alexes to align on onboarding feature
action_items.source_quote: I'll schedule a sync call for both of them by July 9th.

action_items.description: Update auth service before rate limiting work can proceed
action_items.source_quote: I'll update the auth service by July 11th.
